surfaces.command: find OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Protos -type f -name '*.proto' | sort | xargs -I {} sh -c 'echo "# FILE: {}"; cat "{}"'

for f in OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Features/Data/Feature.cs OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Features/Data/FeatureStagePlan.cs OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Features/Data/FeatureState.cs; do echo "# FILE: $f"; grep -nE '^(\s*)(public|internal|private|protected)?\s*(partial\s+)?(class|record|enum|interface)\s|public\s+[^()]+\s+[A-Za-z_][A-Za-z0-9_]*\s*\{\s*(get|set|init|private)' "$f" | sed -E 's/(\})[[:space:]]*=[[:space:]]*[^;]+;/\1/' || true; done

grep -rEn 'new RpcException\(new Status\(StatusCode\.[A-Za-z]+' OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Features --include='*.cs' | sed -E 's/^([^:]+):([0-9]+):.*StatusCode\.([A-Za-z]+).*/\1 :: \3/' | sort | uniq -c | sort -k2
grep -hEn 'Feature inline edit applied' OneMoreTaskTracker.Features/Features/Update/*.cs | sed -E 's/[[:space:]]+/ /g' | sort
